criteria.reason: discover_node_devices(node='', max_devices=200, max_seconds=20.0) clamps caps via min/max with DEVICE_CAP/SECONDS_CAP, calls DiscoverNode(DiscoveryRequest(node=node)), drains GetNodeDiscoveryProgress(DiscoveryRequest(node=node)), returns dict with node/progress_timed_out/state/promille/count/devices/caps plus status/discover_started.

_drain_progress helper shared by both discover_devices and discover_node_devices; no duplicated loop body. Catches grpc.RpcError, re-raises unless code()==DEADLINE_EXCEEDED, then sets timed_out=True keeping partial devices. test_node_deadline_is_graceful proves progress_timed_out=True with count=1 partial device and no exception. discover_devices retains status/discover_started/state/promille/count/devices/caps shape.

discover_node_devices registered via @server.tool inside register_discovery_tools (axxon_mcp_server.py:892-895); wiring conditional on existing discovery param, no new flag or create_server param. DISCOVERY_TOOL_NAMES includes 'discover_node_devices' (confirmed at runtime).
4 new DiscoverNodeTests (aggregate+echo node, cap clamp, deadline graceful, empty defaults current) plus full suite of 790 tests green on rerun.
